name: ExtensionGroup_Type
title: R5: person | animal | practitioner | device | careteam | healthcareservice | location | organization | relatedperson | specimen
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Group.type` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Group.type` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Group.type` 1..1 `code`
*  R4B: `Group.type` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `Group.type` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Group.type` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Group.type` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.short: R5: person | animal | practitioner | device | careteam | healthcareservice | location | organization | relatedperson | specimen
element.comment:
Element `Group.type` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Group.type` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
Group members SHALL be of the appropriate resource type (Patient for person or animal; or Practitioner, PractitionerRole, Device, CareTeam, HealthcareService, Location, Organization, RelatedPerson, or Specimen for the other types.), or a Group of the resources of the appropriate type.

element.short: person | animal | practitioner | device | careteam | healthcareservice | location | organization | relatedperson | specimen
element.definition: Identifies the broad classification of the kind of resources the group includes.
element.comment: Group members SHALL be of the appropriate resource type (Patient for person or animal; or Practitioner, PractitionerRole, Device, CareTeam, HealthcareService, Location, Organization, RelatedPerson, or Specimen for the other types.), or a Group of the resources of the appropriate type.

binding.description: Types of resources that are part of group.
